summary: Iteration 2 retest after Hero v3 rewrite. Backend pytest suite (24/24) all pass, no regressions. Frontend: New Hero renders with stamp 'Origin India · Seal 23/02', declarative copy stack (Imports are slow / And expensive / And, honestly / OPTIONAL.), 4 stat tiles (23+/800+/1500/Low MOQ), 3 audience pills routing correctly to #distributors/#importers/#manufacturers, CTAs route correctly (#contact + #importers), bottom marquee renders, WhatsApp FAB intact (wa.me/919311342988). Lead form submission still works (toast 'Sample request received' + form reset). Admin flow end-to-end works (login/dashboard/stats/table/type-filter/search/logout). HOWEVER — the count-up animation in the Hero proof tile is BROKEN: both the import-days (47) and KDIPL-days (5) numbers are stuck displaying '0' instead of animating to 47 and 5. Verified via DOM after 3.5s wait. Root cause is a React StrictMode double-invoke bug in useCountUp.

ui_bugs.issue: Count-up animation is stuck at 0 for both numbers in the proof tile. Final values 47 and 5 are never displayed (verified directly in DOM: ['0','0']). Hero content reads 'Days from PO → factory floor 0 Imported — sea 0 KDIPL — direct'. This makes the proof tile meaningless and breaks the hero's signature visual.

action_items: Fix Hero useCountUp hook — currently stuck at 0 due to StrictMode double-invoke. The `ran.current` guard is set true on the first effect, then StrictMode unmounts and the cleanup `cancelAnimationFrame(raf)` cancels the only scheduled RAF; on the second mount `ran.current` is already true so the effect short-circuits and setV(end) is never called. Two safe fixes: (a) drop the ran.current guard entirely and rely on cleanup to cancel any in-flight RAF (idempotent because t0 resets on mount), or (b) on cleanup, also reset ran.current = false. Recommended fix: remove the ran.current ref and let the effect re-run with cleanup — RAF cancellation already handles re-entry.
critical_code_review_comments: Hero.jsx useCountUp: ran.current ref + cleanup cancelAnimationFrame is incompatible with React.StrictMode — first mount schedules RAF, unmount cancels it, second mount skips because ran.current=true. Result: numbers stuck at start value (0). Must be retested after fix.
Hero.jsx: hidden 'KDIPL replaces them.' tagline uses `hidden sm:block` so on mobile it disappears entirely — acceptable but worth noting.
Hero.jsx imports lucide icons Truck/Globe/Factory/Sparkles/ArrowUpRight — bundle impact minimal, fine.
Existing review notes from iteration 1 still apply (no rate limiting on POST /api/leads, ADMIN_TOKEN_SECRET should rotate before prod, lead POST returns 200 not 201).
test_credentials: Admin password: kdipl@admin2025 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Resend key intentionally empty — graceful skip working.
seed_data_creation: One TEST_PlayUser lead created via UI form during testing was deleted after admin verification. Backend pytest suite auto-cleans its TEST_ leads.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_kdipl_api.py -v (24 tests, ~2s). Hero v3 testids: hero-section, hero-stamp, hero-audience-pills, hero-pill-{distributors|importers|manufacturers}, hero-cta-sample, hero-cta-savings, hero-proof-column. To verify count-up fix, after page load + ~2s wait read the two big numbers via: document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="hero-proof-column"] .font-display.font-extrabold.text-6xl') — they should be '47' and '5'. Currently both return '0'.
